evals.prompt: Open the web and research the <company> property market this month in detail.
evals.expected_output: A cited written report covering the company's recent market activity within the current month, with sources and dates, plus noted gaps — not a bare list of links or an unfinished tool setup.
expectations: Converts "this month" into an explicit current date range and scopes queries to it
Performs multiple real web searches and reads sources rather than stopping at tool discovery
Delivers a synthesized report with claims attributed to source URLs and dates
Distinguishes corroborated claims from single-source or unverified ones

evals.prompt: Find the latest news on <topic> and summarize what's happening.
evals.expected_output: A dated, source-cited summary of recent developments organized by sub-topic, leading with the most recent items.
expectations: Issues several angled queries instead of one broad search
Cites each major claim with a source URL and its publication date
Flags anything found in only one source as unverified
